finding: A caller-supplied Pages project identity report could previously replace recomputation from the exact deployment proof in the six-argument workflow path.
improvement: Pages project identity is now always recomputed from the exact proof bytes' parsed object. A supplied report is consistency evidence only, and disagreement fails closed with project-identity-report-mismatch.

verification.source_review: The committed verifier invokes validatePagesProjectIdentity(proof, expectedProject) unconditionally and marks supplied-report disagreement invalid.
test_cases: forged valid report plus proof from another Pages project is rejected
valid exact proof plus matching supplied report is accepted

falsification_routes: Supply a valid-looking report for another-project proof and confirm projectIdentityEvidence.status is invalid.
Inspect the verification manifest and confirm derivation equals recomputed-from-exact-proof.
limits: No live Cloudflare deployment was performed.
Hostname membership does not prove Cloudflare account ownership or exact deployed commit.
The regression test was committed but no GitHub Actions result was observed during this run.
No diagnosis or treatment claim is made.
privacy: Public repository source and synthetic deployment fixtures only; no credentials, private chat, or health data persisted.
